_publications._publicationTitle: NF1 heterozygosity fosters de novo tumorigenesis but impairs malignant transformation.

_contextSnippet: At one year of age, the majority of PLP CreERT2; Nf1 f/− (77 out of 104, 74%) mice already developed pNF...no MPNST developed in PLP CreERT2; Nf1 f/− mice (0 out of 104, 0%)
resourceName: PLP CreERT2; Nf1 f/−; ROSA-LacZ mice
details: 74% of mice developed pNF at one year of age compared to 29% in control mice, but 0% developed MPNST compared to 10% in control mice
